title: Battery Bank Inspection
description: Inspect cabinet battery bank and terminals

title: Microwave Dish Alignment
description: Verify dish alignment and received signal level

title: Generator Fuel Check
description: Check generator fuel level and run status
notes: Only required for sites with standby generator

title: Cabinet Filter Replacement
description: Replace air intake filters in the equipment cabinet

title: Earthing Continuity Test
description: Test cabinet and mast earthing continuity
notes: Attach meter readings to the job notes

title: Solar Panel Clean
description: Clean solar panels and inspect mounting hardware

title: Antenna Feeder Sweep
description: Sweep feeder cable and record return loss

title: Firmware Version Audit
description: Record firmware versions for managed equipment
notes: No change work unless separately approved

title: Security Lock Replacement
description: Replace damaged or missing site locks
notes: Confirm key barrel type before visit

title: Vegetation Clearance Review
description: Assess vegetation clearance around access path
notes: Create follow-up work if clearance is required

title: UPS Runtime Test
description: Run UPS runtime test and record result
notes: Coordinate with operations before load test

title: Cable Label Refresh
description: Replace faded or missing cable labels

title: Water Ingress Inspection
description: Inspect cabinet seals and water ingress points
notes: Photograph any staining or pooled water

title: Spare Parts Stocktake
description: Count critical spares stored at site

title: Radio Link Health Check
description: Check radio link counters and alarms

title: Mast Bolt Torque Check
description: Check accessible mast bolts with torque wrench
notes: Stop if weather conditions are unsafe

title: Access Track Condition Review
description: Review access track condition and gate status
notes: Note if 4WD or contractor support is needed
